description: Add a Typecheck gate to the harness CI ci job covering both TypeScript packages — packages/docs (pnpm workspace) and packages/oh (npm standalone) — plus a matching root typecheck script for local-dev parity.

userStories.title: Add Typecheck steps to the CI ci job
userStories.description: As a maintainer, I want CI to run tsc --noEmit for both TypeScript packages so a type regression in either fails the PR instead of shipping silently.
acceptanceCriteria: In .github/workflows/ci-harness.yml, a step named 'Typecheck (workspace packages)' exists in the ci job, immediately after the 'Format check' step and before 'Build', with command verbatim: pnpm --filter './packages/**' -r --if-present run typecheck
A second step named 'Typecheck (oh CLI — npm standalone)' follows it (still before 'Build'), running: npm --prefix packages/oh ci then npm --prefix packages/oh run typecheck
The ci job name: (line 49) is updated from 'Lint, Build & Test' to include Typecheck (e.g. 'Lint, Typecheck, Build & Test')
grep -n 'Typecheck' .github/workflows/ci-harness.yml returns the new step lines
The workflow file remains valid YAML (parses without error)
userStories.notes: Completed via /delegate on 2026-06-12; two Typecheck steps + job-name update in ci-harness.yml; YAML validated (js-yaml).

userStories.title: Add a root typecheck script for local-dev parity
userStories.description: As a developer, I want a single pnpm typecheck command at the repo root so I can run the same type checks locally that CI runs.
acceptanceCriteria: Root package.json scripts block contains a 'typecheck' script: pnpm --filter './packages/**' -r --if-present run typecheck && npm --prefix packages/oh run typecheck
package.json remains valid JSON (node -e require parses it)
pnpm typecheck at the repo root exits 0 on the current tree (oh deps installed)
userStories.notes: Completed via /delegate on 2026-06-12; root typecheck script added; pnpm typecheck exit 0.

userStories.title: Record the change in the changelog
userStories.description: As a maintainer, I want the changelog to note the new CI gate so the change is traceable per the repo's Keep-a-Changelog convention.
acceptanceCriteria: One bullet is appended to the END of the '### Added' list under '## [Unreleased]' in CHANGELOG.md, describing the typecheck gate (both packages) + root script, linking issue #51
The bullet falls within the '## [Unreleased]' block (between '## [Unreleased]' and the next '## [' heading) — verified by a range check, not an unanchored grep
CHANGELOG.md still renders as valid Keep-a-Changelog markdown (no broken headings)
userStories.notes: Completed via /delegate on 2026-06-12; Added bullet linking #51 inside [Unreleased].
